result.summary: The Gaza ceasefire has shown limited progress, with challenges persisting despite the six-month agreement, and tensions between Lebanon and Israel are escalating.
result.reasoning: The risk level is assigned as medium due to the ongoing challenges in maintaining the ceasefire and the increasing tensions between Lebanon and Israel.

signals.text: Israel blocked Spain from participating in the work of a US-led centre established to help stabilise post-war Gaza following the ceasefire.

best.description: A sustained and peaceful ceasefire with minimal challenges

likely.description: A fragile ceasefire with ongoing tensions between Lebanon and Israel, but no major escalation

worst.description: A major escalation of violence leading to a breakdown in the ceasefire

sources.name: BBC World News
sources.title: Lebanon and Israel officials to meet in US on Tuesday
